name: Statistical Foundations of Business Analytics
description: The purpose of the module is to introduce business analytics to the non-specialist. The course aims to provide a broad understanding of descriptive, prescriptive, and predictive techniques in business analytics. It will also provide students with the ability to derive and understand a variety of graphs and statistical models which can be produced in Excel, and which provide a means for managers to make intelligent use of analytics for management, operations, and business decision-making.
